Just to be clear, this means review open will defer the event streaming only to the UI if the UI is being served? So if we ran this without the ui server, the streaming will happen in CLI only? I think we really need to think about this before making a big decision. Ultiimately, I think it would be ideal for both to run at the same time. Streaming events from CLI and streaming those same events from the browser shouldn't be impacting one another
This sounds really bad. SSE messages should not be triggering full review refetch, the refetch should be scoped to the UI elements that are related.
